items.title: Butterfly that barely ages could help unlock longevity secrets

items.title: One common fat may fuel type 2 diabetes while another helps fight it
items.summary: Not all fats affect your body the same way. Researchers found that palmitic acid, a saturated fat common in many foods, may contribute to insulin resistance and type 2 diabetes by triggering inflammation, toxic fat buildup, and cellular stress.
